response.global_analysis:
1. JSON Match: N/A, the reference JSON is for the song 'RENEGADE' which plays in the background. However, the foreground audio is fully verbal dialogue/skit rather than song lyrics. Therefore, manual transcription of the dialogue was required.
2. JSON Usage: The background music/lyrics from the reference JSON were discarded to prioritize transcribing the spoken foreground dialogue.
3. Timing & Pacing: Timed all spoken lines tightly to match each character's speech patterns, including hysterical screams, fast-paced dialogue, and rapid-fire technical speech. All bleeped-out parts were omitted or transcribed accordingly.

subtitles.original: All right, the place is empty.
subtitles.english: All right, the place is empty.

subtitles.original: Got about 10 minutes before the guard's next patrol.
subtitles.english: Got about 10 minutes before the guard's next patrol.

subtitles.original: So, this is the YAGO trophy?
subtitles.english: So, this is the YAGO trophy?

subtitles.original: The Giga-Mega National Treasure.
subtitles.english: The Giga-Mega National Treasure.

subtitles.original: I'm going to make a fortune on this.
subtitles.english: I'm going to make a fortune on this.

subtitles.original: This is Justice. Is this an emergency?
subtitles.english: This is Justice. Is this an emergency?

subtitles.original: Help! Help! Please! Please! Can you please help me? Please, is somebody here right now? I don't know what to do! Please!
subtitles.english: Help! Help! Please! Please! Can you please help me? Please, is somebody here right now? I don't know what to do! Please!

subtitles.original: Calm down and take a deep breath.
subtitles.english: Calm down and take a deep breath.

subtitles.original: Can you tell me exactly what happened?
subtitles.english: Can you tell me exactly what happened?

subtitles.original: Uh, calm down. Calm down.
subtitles.english: Uh, calm down. Calm down.

subtitles.original: Leave it to us. Leave it to us.
subtitles.english: Leave it to us. Leave it to us.

subtitles.original: Justice is on the way right now!
subtitles.english: Justice is on the way right now!

subtitles.original: Everyone, we have a case.
subtitles.english: Everyone, we have a case.

subtitles.original: The Giga-Mega National Treasure has been stolen!
subtitles.english: The Giga-Mega National Treasure has been stolen!

subtitles.original: Head to the scene immediately!
subtitles.english: Head to the scene immediately!

subtitles.original: The Giga-Mega National Treasure?
subtitles.english: The Giga-Mega National Treasure?

subtitles.original: You mean the YAGO statue?
subtitles.english: You mean the YAGO statue?

subtitles.original: Who would even want that? Just let them keep it.
subtitles.english: Who would even want that? Just let them keep it.

subtitles.original: Gigi, that is disrespectful!
subtitles.english: Gigi, that is disrespectful!

subtitles.original: It is still the Giga-Mega National Treasure.
subtitles.english: It is still the Giga-Mega National Treasure.

subtitles.original: We're counting on you.
subtitles.english: We're counting on you.

subtitles.original: Fine, I'm on it.
subtitles.english: Fine, I'm on it.

subtitles.original: Oh wait! Please! Ah!
subtitles.english: Oh wait! Please! Ah!

subtitles.original: The super limited edition sweetie plush drop is in just three minutes!
subtitles.english: The super limited edition sweetie plush drop is in just three minutes!

subtitles.original: It's limited quantity, okay?
subtitles.english: It's limited quantity, okay?

subtitles.original: That... that means I absolutely have to buy it!
subtitles.english: That... that means I absolutely have to buy it!

subtitles.original: Okay, so only two minutes left now.
subtitles.english: Okay, so only two minutes left now.

subtitles.original: Just go already!
subtitles.english: Just go already!

subtitles.original: Ah, no!
subtitles.english: Ah, no!

subtitles.original: Oh my god, the connection! No!
subtitles.english: Oh my god, the connection! No!

subtitles.original: Cecilia, did you get any information?
subtitles.english: Cecilia, did you get any information?

subtitles.original: Cecilia...!
subtitles.english: Cecilia...!

subtitles.original: Hold on! Who the hell changed my keyboard layout to Dvorak?!
subtitles.english: Hold on! Who the hell changed my keyboard layout to Dvorak?!

subtitles.original: But I love my presents, Ceci!
subtitles.english: But I love my presents, Ceci!

subtitles.original: This was you?!
subtitles.english: This was you?!

subtitles.original: You! You absolute piece of sh*t!
subtitles.english: You! You absolute piece of sh*t!

subtitles.original: You absolute garbage can!
subtitles.english: You absolute garbage can!

subtitles.original: When I get you, I'm going to...
subtitles.english: When I get you, I'm going to...

subtitles.original: Cecilia, every second counts here.
subtitles.english: Cecilia, every second counts here.

subtitles.original: I know, I know.
subtitles.english: I know, I know.

subtitles.original: All right, found a backdoor on the palace server.
subtitles.english: All right, found a backdoor on the palace server.

subtitles.original: Cracking the encrypted protocol with brute force...
subtitles.english: Cracking the encrypted protocol with brute force...

subtitles.original: ...enforcing the security patch overdrive on the mainframe.
subtitles.english: ...enforcing the security patch overdrive on the mainframe.

subtitles.original: Fine, I'm in!
subtitles.english: Fine, I'm in!

subtitles.original: The suspect is a woman dressed entirely in black.
subtitles.english: The suspect is a woman dressed entirely in black.

subtitles.original: Height looks around 168 centimeters.
subtitles.english: Height looks around 168 centimeters.

subtitles.original: She really likes people wearing helmets.
subtitles.english: She really likes people wearing helmets.

subtitles.english: Ah, she's fleeing north!

subtitles.original: If you move now, you can still catch her.
subtitles.english: If you move now, you can still catch her.

subtitles.english: Let's move out and apprehend the suspect!
